name: NEWELL BRANDS INC.
summary: PART I Newell Brands or the Company refers to Newell Brands Inc. alone or with its wholly owned subsidiaries, as the context requires. When this report uses the words we, us or our, it refers to the Company and its subsidiaries unless the context otherwise requires. The Company was founded in Ogdensburg, New York in 1903 and is incorporated in Delaware.
